title: colysis lanceolata
intro: Colysis lanceolata, also known as the lance-leaf colysis, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Colysis lanceolata include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, headaches, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Colysis lanceolata is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
